title: Harden manager login and session recovery UX
description: Update the manager app auth flow so login starts blank by default, API auth-session feedback is surfaced cleanly, and unauthorized or session-expired states recover predictably without dev bootstrap shortcuts.
acceptance_criteria: Manager login screen is blank by default unless explicit bootstrap env values are provided
API invalid credential and session lifecycle feedback is mapped to deterministic user-facing states
Unauthorized and session-expired screens recover back into login without stale session state
